name: PUMapPin
description: Two pin types used on the Explore map. Tap to select — selected pins spring up and turn primary purple. Tap again to deselect.

props.name: variant
props.description: Pin shape — teardrop (46×62px) for WiFi hotspots, dot (30×30px) for secondary points of interest

props.name: selected
props.description: Selected state — turns pin primary purple and springs up with a lift animation

props.name: onClick
props.description: Tap handler — enables pointer cursor on web

props.name: dark
props.description: Dark surface — adjusts spot shadow from black to white tint

props.name: color
props.description: Override fill colour for unselected state. Selected state always uses colors.brand (#7458FD) regardless of this prop.

behaviour.notes: manage selected state externally — pin is a controlled component
